actions.name: Suspicious Minds
actions.description:
Trigger: A creature in range suffers damage or an effect from the End of Activation effect of a @Trait[dot] Affliction.

Effect: For each End of Activation @Trait[dot] effect that was triggered on the target, the target loses an additional @Tick[-1]. The affected creature is protected from further instances of this perk until their next activation commences.

cost.trigger: A creature in range suffers effect damage from an Affliction due to a Stack being removed.

system.description:
